sd_usb: 1. Insert the MicroSD card into a USB 3.0 card reader, then connect the reader to your PC.
emmc: 1. Set Boot Mode Switch to USB Download
2. Connect the board OTG port to your PC via a USB cable.
3. Power on the board. Board enters download mode on power-up.

sd_usb: 1. Safely eject and remove the MicroSD card from the USB card reader.
2. Insert the MicroSD card into the board's MicroSD card slot.
3. Set the board's boot mode switch to MicroSD Boot Mode.
4. Connect the power adapter and wait for the board to boot into your new system.
emmc: 1. Disconnect all cables from the board
2. Set the board's boot mode switch to eMMC Boot Mode.
3. Connect the power adapter and wait for the board to boot into your new system.
